title: vtext-sync message envelope
description: Envelope for every message file under sync/c2s/ and sync/s2c/. See sync/PROTOCOL.md.

protocol.description: Protocol version tag. Bump on incompatible changes.

id.description: 8-hex unique message id, matches the <id> segment of the filename.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence within this direction, matches the <seq> segment of the filename.

type.description: Dotted-namespace message type, e.g. ops.version.request. Extensible.

in_reply_to.description: id of the request this message answers, or null for unsolicited messages.

expects_reply.description: Whether the sender expects a response message.

payload.description: Type-specific content. Empty object when there is none.
